mapper.select:
select v.activityalias_ , v.businessstate_ , t1.id , t1.secret_level , t1.project_id , t1.project_name , t1.task_id , t1.task_name , t1.zyjk_ys_date , t1.zyjk_name , t1.zyjk_date , t1.zyjk_no , t1.hb_ys_date , t1.hb_name , t1.hb_date , t1.hb_no , t1.aq_ys_date , t1.aq_name , t1.aq_date , t1.aq_no , t1.created_by , t1.creation_date , t1.last_updated_by , t1.last_update_date , t1.last_update_ip , t1.version , t1.created_dept , t1.org_identity , t1.attribute_01 , t1.attribute_02 , t1.attribute_03 , t1.attribute_04 , t1.attribute_05 , t1.attribute_06 , t1.attribute_07 , t1.attribute_08 , t1.attribute_09 , t1.attribute_10 from pm_project_ys_sts t1 left join bpm_client_hist_procinst_v v on t1.id = v.formid_
and t1.ID =#{bean.id}
and t1.SECRET_LEVEL like concat(concat('%',#{bean.secretLevel}),'%')
and t1.PROJECT_ID like concat(concat('%',#{bean.projectId}),'%')
and t1.PROJECT_NAME like concat(concat('%',#{bean.projectName}),'%')
and t1.TASK_ID like concat(concat('%',#{bean.taskId}),'%')
and t1.TASK_NAME like concat(concat('%',#{bean.taskName}),'%')
and t1.ZYJK_YS_DATE like concat(concat('%',#{bean.zyjkYsDate}),'%')
and t1.ZYJK_NAME like concat(concat('%',#{bean.zyjkName}),'%')
and t1.ZYJK_DATE >= #{bean.zyjkDateBegin}
and t1.ZYJK_DATE <= #{bean.zyjkDateEnd}
and t1.ZYJK_NO like concat(concat('%',#{bean.zyjkNo}),'%')
and t1.HB_YS_DATE like concat(concat('%',#{bean.hbYsDate}),'%')
and t1.HB_NAME like concat(concat('%',#{bean.hbName}),'%')
and t1.HB_DATE >= #{bean.hbDateBegin}
and t1.HB_DATE <= #{bean.hbDateEnd}
and t1.HB_NO like concat(concat('%',#{bean.hbNo}),'%')
and t1.AQ_YS_DATE like concat(concat('%',#{bean.aqYsDate}),'%')
and t1.AQ_NAME like concat(concat('%',#{bean.aqName}),'%')
and t1.AQ_DATE >= #{bean.aqDateBegin}
and t1.AQ_DATE <= #{bean.aqDateEnd}
and t1.AQ_NO like concat(concat('%',#{bean.aqNo}),'%')
and t1.CREATED_BY like concat(concat('%',#{bean.createdBy}),'%')
and t1.CREATION_DATE like concat(concat('%',#{bean.creationDate}),'%')
and t1.LAST_UPDATED_BY like concat(concat('%',#{bean.lastUpdatedBy}),'%')
and t1.LAST_UPDATE_DATE like concat(concat('%',#{bean.lastUpdateDate}),'%')
and t1.LAST_UPDATE_IP like concat(concat('%',#{bean.lastUpdateIp}),'%')
and t1.VERSION like concat(concat('%',#{bean.version}),'%')
and t1.CREATED_DEPT like concat(concat('%',#{bean.createdDept}),'%')
and t1.ORG_IDENTITY like concat(concat('%',#{bean.orgIdentity}),'%')
and t1.ATTRIBUTE_01 like concat(concat('%',#{bean.attribute01}),'%')
and t1.ATTRIBUTE_02 like concat(concat('%',#{bean.attribute02}),'%')
and t1.ATTRIBUTE_03 like concat(concat('%',#{bean.attribute03}),'%')
and t1.ATTRIBUTE_04 like concat(concat('%',#{bean.attribute04}),'%')
and t1.ATTRIBUTE_05 like concat(concat('%',#{bean.attribute05}),'%')
and t1.ATTRIBUTE_06 like concat(concat('%',#{bean.attribute06}),'%')
and t1.ATTRIBUTE_07 like concat(concat('%',#{bean.attribute07}),'%')
and t1.ATTRIBUTE_08 like concat(concat('%',#{bean.attribute08}),'%')
and t1.ATTRIBUTE_09 like concat(concat('%',#{bean.attribute09}),'%')
and t1.ATTRIBUTE_10 like concat(concat('%',#{bean.attribute10}),'%')
and exists (select 1 from BPM_CLIENT_HIST_TASK_V os where os.task_b_id_ = t1.id and os.assignee_ = #{bean.currUserId})
and v.businessstate_ = #{bean.bpmState}
and ${sfnConditions.sql}
and t1.ORG_IDENTITY =#{org}
order by t1.creation_date desc

select t1.id , t1.secret_level , t1.project_id , t1.project_name , t1.task_id , t1.task_name , t1.zyjk_ys_date , t1.zyjk_name , t1.zyjk_date , t1.zyjk_no , t1.hb_ys_date , t1.hb_name , t1.hb_date , t1.hb_no , t1.aq_ys_date , t1.aq_name , t1.aq_date , t1.aq_no , t1.created_by , t1.creation_date , t1.last_updated_by , t1.last_update_date , t1.last_update_ip , t1.version , t1.created_dept , t1.org_identity , t1.attribute_01 , t1.attribute_02 , t1.attribute_03 , t1.attribute_04 , t1.attribute_05 , t1.attribute_06 , t1.attribute_07 , t1.attribute_08 , t1.attribute_09 , t1.attribute_10 from pm_project_ys_sts t1 where t1.id = #{id}
mapper.insert:
insert into pm_project_ys_sts
id,
secret_level,
project_id,
project_name,
task_id,
task_name,
zyjk_ys_date,
zyjk_name,
zyjk_date,
zyjk_no,
hb_ys_date,
hb_name,
hb_date,
hb_no,
aq_ys_date,
aq_name,
aq_date,
aq_no,
created_by,
creation_date,
last_updated_by,
last_update_date,
last_update_ip,
version,
created_dept,
org_identity,
attribute_01,
attribute_02,
attribute_03,
attribute_04,
attribute_05,
attribute_06,
attribute_07,
attribute_08,
attribute_09,
attribute_10,
#{id,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{secretLevel,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{projectId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{projectName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{taskId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{taskName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{zyjkYsDate,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{zyjkName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{zyjkDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
#{zyjkNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{hbYsDate,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{hbName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{hbDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
#{hbNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{aqYsDate,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{aqName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{aqDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
#{aqNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{createdBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{creationDate},
#{lastUpdatedBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{lastUpdateDate},
#{lastUpdateIp,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{version,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
#{createdDept,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{orgIdentity,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{attribute01,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{attribute02,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{attribute03,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{attribute04,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{attribute05,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{attribute06,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{attribute07,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
#{attribute08,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
#{attribute09,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
#{attribute10,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},

insert into pm_project_ys_sts( id, secret_level, project_id, project_name, task_id, task_name, zyjk_ys_date, zyjk_name, zyjk_date, zyjk_no, hb_ys_date, hb_name, hb_date, hb_no, aq_ys_date, aq_name, aq_date, aq_no, created_by, creation_date, last_updated_by, last_update_date, last_update_ip, version, created_dept, org_identity, attribute_01, attribute_02, attribute_03, attribute_04, attribute_05, attribute_06, attribute_07, attribute_08, attribute_09, attribute_10)
select #{item.id,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.secretLevel,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.projectId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.projectName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.taskId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.taskName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.zyjkYsDate,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.zyjkName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.zyjkDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{item.zyjkNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.hbYsDate,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.hbName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.hbDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{item.hbNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.aqYsDate,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.aqName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.aqDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{item.aqNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.createdBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.creationDate}, #{item.lastUpdatedBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.lastUpdateDate}, #{item.lastUpdateIp,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.version,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{item.createdDept,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.orgIdentity,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.attribute01,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.attribute02,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.attribute03,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.attribute04,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.attribute05,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.attribute06,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.attribute07,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{item.attribute08,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{item.attribute09,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{item.attribute10,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} from dual
mapper.update:
update pm_project_ys_sts
id =#{id,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
secret_level =#{secretLevel,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
project_id =#{projectId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
project_name =#{projectName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
task_id =#{taskId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
task_name =#{taskName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
zyjk_ys_date =#{zyjkYsDate,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
zyjk_name =#{zyjkName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
zyjk_date =#{zyjkDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
zyjk_no =#{zyjkNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
hb_ys_date =#{hbYsDate,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
hb_name =#{hbName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
hb_date =#{hbDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
hb_no =#{hbNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
aq_ys_date =#{aqYsDate,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
aq_name =#{aqName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
aq_date =#{aqDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
aq_no =#{aqNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
created_by =#{createdBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
creation_date =#{creationDate},
last_updated_by =#{lastUpdatedBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
last_update_date =#{lastUpdateDate},
last_update_ip =#{lastUpdateIp,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
version =version+1,
created_dept =#{createdDept,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
org_identity =#{orgIdentity,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
attribute_01 =#{attribute01,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
attribute_02 =#{attribute02,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
attribute_03 =#{attribute03,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
attribute_04 =#{attribute04,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
attribute_05 =#{attribute05,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
attribute_06 =#{attribute06,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
attribute_07 =#{attribute07,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
attribute_08 =#{attribute08,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
attribute_09 =#{attribute09,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
attribute_10 =#{attribute10,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
where id = #{id} and version =#{version}

update pm_project_ys_sts set id =#{id,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, secret_level =#{secretLevel,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, project_id =#{projectId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, project_name =#{projectName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, task_id =#{taskId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, task_name =#{taskName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, zyjk_ys_date =#{zyjkYsDate,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, zyjk_name =#{zyjkName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, zyjk_date =#{zyjkDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, zyjk_no =#{zyjkNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, hb_ys_date =#{hbYsDate,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, hb_name =#{hbName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, hb_date =#{hbDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, hb_no =#{hbNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, aq_ys_date =#{aqYsDate,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, aq_name =#{aqName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, aq_date =#{aqDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, aq_no =#{aqNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, created_by =#{createdBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, creation_date =#{creationDate}, last_updated_by =#{lastUpdatedBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, last_update_date =#{lastUpdateDate}, last_update_ip =#{lastUpdateIp,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, version =version+1, created_dept =#{createdDept,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, org_identity =#{orgIdentity,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, attribute_01 =#{attribute01,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, attribute_02 =#{attribute02,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, attribute_03 =#{attribute03,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, attribute_04 =#{attribute04,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, attribute_05 =#{attribute05,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, attribute_06 =#{attribute06,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, attribute_07 =#{attribute07,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, attribute_08 =#{attribute08,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, attribute_09 =#{attribute09,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, attribute_10 =#{attribute10,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} where id = #{id} and version =#{version}

update.foreach: update pm_project_ys_sts set id =#{item.id,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, secret_level =#{item.secretLevel,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, project_id =#{item.projectId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, project_name =#{item.projectName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, task_id =#{item.taskId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, task_name =#{item.taskName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, zyjk_ys_date =#{item.zyjkYsDate,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, zyjk_name =#{item.zyjkName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, zyjk_date =#{item.zyjkDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, zyjk_no =#{item.zyjkNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, hb_ys_date =#{item.hbYsDate,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, hb_name =#{item.hbName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, hb_date =#{item.hbDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, hb_no =#{item.hbNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, aq_ys_date =#{item.aqYsDate,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, aq_name =#{item.aqName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, aq_date =#{item.aqDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, aq_no =#{item.aqNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, created_by =#{item.createdBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, creation_date =#{item.creationDate}, last_updated_by =#{item.lastUpdatedBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, last_update_date =#{item.lastUpdateDate}, last_update_ip =#{item.lastUpdateIp,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, version =version+1, created_dept =#{item.createdDept,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, org_identity =#{item.orgIdentity,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, attribute_01 =#{item.attribute01,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, attribute_02 =#{item.attribute02,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, attribute_03 =#{item.attribute03,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, attribute_04 =#{item.attribute04,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, attribute_05 =#{item.attribute05,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, attribute_06 =#{item.attribute06,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, attribute_07 =#{item.attribute07,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, attribute_08 =#{item.attribute08,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, attribute_09 =#{item.attribute09,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, attribute_10 =#{item.attribute10,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} where id = #{item.id} and version =#{item.version};
